title.en: Get EUBUCCO building footprints for catchment

description.en: Fetches building footprint data from the EUBUCCO v0.2 dataset (https://eubucco.com) for all NUTS2 regions overlapping a given catchment, combines and deduplicates results, and returns them as a single spatial object with attributes including construction year, type, height, and floors (R function 'get_eubucco_buildings')

inputFile1_catchment_gpkg.title: Catchment boundary
inputFile1_catchment_gpkg.description: Path to a .gpkg file containing the catchment (or other area of interest) polygon used to find overlapping NUTS2 regions and clip the returned buildings.

inputFile2_countriesForCatchment_rds.title: Countries overlapping catchment
inputFile2_countriesForCatchment_rds.description: Path to an .rds file containing the list of country codes overlapping the catchment, used to restrict the NUTS2 region search.

buildings_rds.title: EUBUCCO building footprints
buildings_rds.description: Spatial object (sf) of EUBUCCO v0.2 building footprints for the catchment, deduplicated across NUTS2 regions, with attributes including type, height, floors, and construction year where available.

cor_distribution_across_lau_histogram.title: CORINE class distribution across LAU histogram
cor_distribution_across_lau_histogram.description: Interactive histogram of the number of LAU containing each urban CORINE class.
